review: Used to be able to sign in to my account using my email and password. For some reason they removed this option and they make you have to click a link sent to your email that never works. What a stupid change. I have been locked out of my account for months now and all my points probably expired. Customer service was so unhelpful. All your competitors still have password sign in...Fire whoever made this app and hire me instead. I will build a better app for you
